name: Dominate Monster

rulesText.description: Used as an aberrant lich-style high-tier psychic power. DM may reflavor as invasive flesh/voice control.

mechanics.label: Boss Only
mechanics.description: Capella can cast this directly while Boss Presence is active.

mechanics.label: Tier 8
mechanics.description: Outside boss mode, treat this as high-tier casting that requires explicit story/DM permission.

mechanics.label: Telepathic
mechanics.description: You can issue commands while you are conscious.

mechanics.label: Control
mechanics.description: You can spend your action to take precise control until the end of your next turn.

mechanics.label: Damage Save
mechanics.description: Any time the target takes damage, it gets a new Wisdom save.

desc: Used as an aberrant lich-style high-tier psychic power. DM may reflavor as invasive flesh/voice control.
